name: Baked Cheddar Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the olives and pat dry with towels.
2. Combine the grated Cheddar cheese and softened butter in a bowl.
3. Add flour and cayenne pepper, then blend until well mixed.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto wax paper.
5. Wrap or mold each piece of dough around an olive, covering it completely.
6. Place the wrapped olives on a baking sheet in the middle of a preheated 400°F oven.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve warm. Makes 24 olives.
